summary: UltraMatrix recording delivers very good, non‑sterile sound with a solid mix, though reviewers give no detail on the musical performance.
review: The sole review praises the UltraMatrix source for its clear yet ambient sound, noting just enough venue echo to avoid a sterile soundboard feel and complimenting the solid mix. No specific comments about song execution or band members are provided, so the show quality cannot be assessed beyond the positive recording impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review focusing on a good UltraMatrix mix; lacking performance details, rating reflects solid recording quality but limited show information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very good sound with appropriate venue ambience and echo; solid, non‑sterile mix praised by reviewer.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
